zh.Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England: 英國英格蘭波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德
zh.Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭貝維其可爾德雷包
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Lancaster於大約1140年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德時，她的父親William de Lancaster I25歲，母親Gundred de Warenne-4歲。她與Richard de Morville在英國英格蘭波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1191年享年52歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England: 英国英格兰波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德
zh-hans.Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland: 苏格兰貝維其可爾德雷包
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Lancaster于大约1140年出生在英国英格兰波藍德时，她的父亲William de Lancaster I25岁，母亲Gundred de Warenne-4岁。她与Richard de Morville在英国英格兰波藍德吉爾可斯瓦爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1191年享年52岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Lancaster was born about 1140, in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Lancaster I, was 25 and her mother, Gundred de Warenne, was -4. She married Richard de Morville in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1191, at the age of 52, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Lancaster est née environ 1140, à Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Lancaster I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Gundred de Warenne, avait -4 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Morville à Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1191, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Lancaster um 1140 in Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Lancaster I 25 und ihre Mutter Gundred de Warenne -4. Sie hat in Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom Richard de Morville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1191 im Alter von 52 Jahren und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Lancaster è nata il circa 1140 nel Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William de Lancaster I, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Gundred de Warenne, aveva -4 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Morville nel Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1191, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.1170: から1170年1月8日まで1171年1月7日
ja.Christ Church, Greyfriars, London, Middl: イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン
ja.Westmorland, England: イギリスウエストモーランド
ja.Kirkoswald, Cumberland, England: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドキルコスワルド
ja.Dryburgh, Berwickshire, Scotland: スコットランドバーウィクシュアイアドリブルグ
ja.Cumberland, England: イギリスイギリスクウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Lancasterが約1140年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドで生まれた時，父William de Lancaster Iは25歳，母Gundred de Warenneは-4歳であった。イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドキルコスワルドでRichard de Morvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1191年に52歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Lancaster(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Lancaster I(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gundred de Warenne(은)는 -4세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 커크즈월드에서 Richard de Morville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1191년 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.1170: de 8 de janeiro de 1170 a 7 de janeiro de 1171
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Lancaster nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Lancaster I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Gundred de Warenne, tinha -4 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Morville em Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1191, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Lancaster родилась около 1140 г. в местности кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Lancaster I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Gundred de Warenne, -4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Morville в местности киркосвалд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1191 г. в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.1170: desde 8 de enero de 1170 hasta 7 de enero de 1171

Se casó con Richard de Morville en Kirkoswald, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1191, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
